posts.text: Members of the National Restaurant Association shared the key issues affecting restaurants across South Carolina. Restaurants power our local economies and create jobs, and I’ll keep working to make sure they have the support to grow and succeed!

I enjoyed the opportunity to speak with members of the South Carolina Bankers Association on the steps of our nation’s Capitol. Thanks to leadership like theirs, the Palmetto State continues to be a place where companies can confidently grow and thrive!

A leader, a servant, and the son-in-law of a close friend, Lt. Col Brandon Shah wore our nation’s uniform to protect us. A domestic terrorist took his life but not his legacy. We will not be intimidated. We will not forget. And we will pursue justice with everything we have.

Mindy and I love this family dearly and are lifting them in prayer.

Rest in honor, Brandon.

It’s always great to sit down with South Carolina’s leaders in higher education. College of Charleston’s President Hsu exemplifies the leadership and innovation driving opportunity for students and preparing our next generation for success!

The Senate confirmed South Carolinian General Joshua Rudd to lead @US_CYBERCOM and @NSAGov. A graduate of @FurmanU, General Rudd has spent decades serving our country and brings extensive leadership to protecting American cybersecurity and intelligence capabilities. I congratulate him on this pivotal role and his continued service to our nation! 🇺🇸

South Carolina is leading on medical education!

USC School of Medicine Greenville & VCOM Carolinas are among 53 schools committing to require nutrition education for future doctors - helping train the next generation of doctors to address root causes and improve health outcomes across our nation.


Secretary Kennedy (@SecKennedy)

.@EDSecMcMahon and I announced that, starting this fall, 53 medical schools across 31 states will deliver at least 40 hours of nutrition education during undergraduat

Supply, not subsidies, is how we restore affordability.

By passing the most significant bicameral housing reform package in decades, we are making the dream of homeownership - in South Carolina and across America - a reality.


U.S. Senate Banking Committee GOP (@BankingGOP)

For Chairman @SenatorTimScott, housing affordability is deeply personal.

By passing the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, Congress is delivering on President Trump’s agenda and ensuring that 2026 is truly the year of affo

From the attack at Temple Israel Synagogue in Michigan to the tragedy at Old Dominion University, today’s events remind us of the importance of protecting our communities.

We must stay vigilant, fund DHS, and ensure our law enforcement  and national security professionals have the tools to keep Americans safe. Above all, we must stand united against violence and hatred and reaffirm our commitment to defending our communities across the nation.

Today we celebrate the strength and dedication of working moms. Growing up in a household with a single mom who worked hard to keep a roof over our heads, I’ve seen how much sacrifice and commitment it takes to do it all. To the unsung heroes: we see you and we thank you!

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act is about helping people like my mom have a place to call home.

That’s what happens when red, white, and blue come together to get things done.

Video

⚠️ South Carolinians: Tornado warnings are active in parts of our state. 

If you are in the path of this storm, seek shelter immediately and follow guidance from local officials. Please stay safe and check in on your loved ones.

What works in Washington may not work in Greenwood, South Carolina.

The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act cuts red tape, increases housing supply, and lowers costs so more people can achieve their version of the American Dream.

Video

Anita Zucker, Chairperson and CEO of The InterTech Group, is a former teacher turned businesswoman, who has championed initiatives that strengthen education, support the Jewish community, and expand opportunity across the Lowcountry.

Through her work in business, philanthropy, and education, Anita continues to invest in the people and institutions that help South Carolina thrive. #WomensHistoryMonth

Democrats must do their job: put Americans first and fund DHS.

Video

Voter ID is common sense. Protect our elections and pass the SAVE America Act.

Video

The Kids in Classes Act would provide families with options when a public school closes for more than 3 days due to a public health emergency or prolonged teacher strike. Opportunity shouldn't close even when schools do. foxnews.com/politics/scott-m…
